summary: The diff implements all three requirements with good coverage. REQ-1 (user progress tracking) is implemented via MyProgressPage.tsx, backend progress data, and useGetUserProgress/useGetAchievements hooks. REQ-2 (farmer testimonials) is implemented via TestimonialsPage.tsx, TestimonialSubmissionDialog.tsx, TestimonialManagement.tsx in admin, and backend Testimonial type with approve/delete hooks. REQ-3 (mobile responsiveness) is addressed throughout with responsive classes, mobile nav, touch targets, and proper stacking. One minor gap exists around the achievement/milestone persistence in the backend. Overall implementation appears comprehensive.

missing_requirements.requirement: Achievements or milestones are persisted in the backend per user principal
missing_requirements.reason: The frontend MyProgressPage.tsx and useGetAchievements hook exist, but backend/main.mo is truncated and does not visibly show an achievements or milestones data structure stored per principal. Achievement backend storage cannot be confirmed from the available diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Profile setup dialog that prompts new authenticated users to fill in name, email, and bio on first login
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a profile setup flow or onboarding dialog. ProfileSetupDialog.tsx and its integration in App.tsx are additional features not requested.
The build request does not mention any data migration requirement. This file was added without being requested.
